scenarioLine: You ordered in Dutch. The cashier answered you in English.

options.text: Switch to English too. Honestly? A little relieved.
"Mag ik het in het Nederlands proberen?"
options.textEn: Can I try it in Dutch?

options.text: Say nothing, switch to English, then think of the perfect Dutch reply on the bike home.

reveal: If C is your reflex and you wish it weren't, B is the smallest way out: one line, no confrontation, and you're still speaking Dutch. You don't have to be good. You just get to stay in.
cta: Save it for your next checkout. Send it to someone learning Dutch with you.
